hooks.command: file_path=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.ya?ml$'; then echo "Running yamllint on $file_path..."; yamllint -c .yamllint.yaml "$file_path" || true; fi

file_path=$(cat /dev/stdin | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '/rendered/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rendered/ is generated output (.gitignore). Do not edit files in rendered/ directly.'; exit 2; fi
